update.changelog:
What's new in 1.3.0:
- Added: RedotPay sponsored banners (footer, dashboard, mobile menu)
- Improved: Banner design — CSS-styled (no more heavy images)
- Removed: Old Melbet banners & image files
- Improved: Dashboard with new RedotPay card
- Fixed: External banners not showing due to config overwrite
- Changed: New top navigation bar with hover dropdowns (replaced old sidebar)
- Fixed: Page scrolling behavior (body handles scrolling, no more flex issues)
- Improved: Mobile menu slide-in from left with smooth animation
- Cleaned: Dead code and legacy backward-compat config removed
